subcodes.first_line: The servant testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily He Who cannot be known through attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه هو الذی لا یعرف بالاوصاف و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @soul; spirit after death, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
